mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, provider_session_id, trigger_message_id, trigger_type, provider, model, lifecycle, termination_reason, process_id, external_session_id_before, external_session_id_after, started_at, ended_at, exit_code, signal, final_event_type, timeout_kind, error_message, prompt, command_line, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM runs WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY started_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, conversation_id, provider_session_id, trigger_message_id, trigger_type, provider, model, lifecycle, termination_reason, process_id, external_session_id_before, external_session_id_after, started_at, ended_at, exit_code, signal, final_event_type, timeout_kind, error_message, prompt, command_line, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM runs WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND lifecycle = 'running' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE runs SET lifecycle = 'ended', termination_reason = #{terminationReason}, exit_code = #{exitCode}, signal = #{signal}, final_event_type = #{finalEventType}, timeout_kind = #{timeoutKind}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, ended_at = #{endedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND lifecycle = 'running'
